chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 385, 386, 389, 390, 391, 392 & 393 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No. 3096/2018. -------------- 26.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, Advocate for Applicant(s). ---------------- These matters are pending since 2018; whereas, repeatedly adjournments have been sought and today despite chance, Counsel is not ready to proceed. Accordingly, these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution with all pending applications. Office to place copy of this order in the connected cases. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Ayaz
